name: GitHub full-text cross-repo de-referenced — relation-metric
hypothesis: Does the relation-supervised diagonal metric beat IDF on full text?
leakage_checks: references scrubbed from text; train repos disjoint from test repos (cross-repo generalization); embeddings frozen (no fit on test repos).
known_limitations: Pilot scale; full body text (up to 8000 chars) but frozen general-text embedder (not code-specific). Exploratory.
